title: Sour Cream Chocolate Chip Banana Bread
instructions: Grease and flour a 9-inch loaf pan.
In a large bowl, cream the butter with the sugar until light and fluffy.
Add the eggs and mix well.
Whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
Combine the flour mixture with the butter mixture.
Add the bananas, sour cream, and vanilla; stir well.
Pour into prepared pan and bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Cool in the pan for 20 minutes.
Turn out onto a rack to cool before cutting.
